overview: GMR Institute of Technology (GMRIT), established in 1997 by the GMR Varalakshmi Foundation, is a premier autonomous engineering college located in Rajam, Andhra Pradesh. The institution is recognized for its high academic standards, industry-oriented curriculum, and strong emphasis on research and innovation. It is part of the GMR Group's educational initiative, providing a professional learning environment in a sprawling rural setting.
accreditation: UGC Autonomous status. Accredited by NAAC with an 'A' Grade. All undergraduate programs are NBA accredited. Approved by AICTE and affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Kakinada (JNTUK).

coursesAndFees.course: B.Tech (CSE, AI&ML, AI&DS, ECE, EEE, Civil, Mechanical, IT, Chemical)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: 10+2 with 45% aggregate in PCM (40% for SC/ST) + AP EAPCET rank
Diploma in Engineering with valid AP ECET rank

coursesAndFees.course: M.Tech (CSE, VLSI, Power & Industrial Drives, Transportation Engg, etc.)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: B.E./B.Tech with 50% aggregate (45% for SC/ST) + GATE / AP PGECET score

placements.internationalOffers: Occasional (primarily via GMR Group global operations)

admissions.admissionProcess: 70% of seats (Category A) are filled via state-level web counseling (APSCHE) based on AP EAPCET ranks. 30% (Category B) are Management Quota seats filled based on merit or JEE scores. GMRIT also offers significant merit scholarships: 100% tuition waiver for EAPCET ranks < 5,000. Counseling Code: GMRM.
admissions.importantDates: AP EAPCET 2026: May 12–18, 2026; Result: June 2026; AP PGECET 2026: May 27–30, 2026; Counseling: July 2026.

facilities: Separate Hostels for Boys and Girls (In-campus)
Central Library with Digital Resource Centre
Solar Power Plants & Rainwater Harvesting Units
campus.specialNote: The campus is eco-friendly and fully residential, emphasizing holistic development. GMRIT is known for its strong 'Language Lab' and personality development programs that cater to its diverse student population. It also provides 100% financial assistance for selected projects through its GMR Varalakshmi Foundation.

contact.address: GMR Nagar, Rajam, Srikakulam District, Andhra Pradesh - 532127
